task_completion.description: Verify that the bookmarks are organized into the 5 specified folders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Bookmark Bar or Bookmark Manager containing exactly these folders: 'Surveillance Feeds', 'Disease Databases', 'GIS & Mapping', 'Reporting Tools', and 'Personal'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the custom search engine shortcuts are set up.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Chrome settings 'Manage search engines and site search' page showing the custom shortcuts 'pub', 'mmwr', and 'epi' added.

task_completion.description: Verify the homepage and startup pages are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Chrome settings showing the homepage set to https://www.cdc.gov/ and 'On startup' set to open specific pages: cdc.gov, who.int, and promedmail.org.

task_completion.description: Verify Privacy and Security settings for cookies, Do Not Track, and Safe Browsing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Chrome Privacy and Security settings showing 'Block third-party cookies' selected, 'Send a Do Not Track request' enabled, and Safe Browsing set to 'Enhanced protection'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the specified Chrome flags are enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the chrome://flags page showing 'Parallel downloading' and 'Smooth Scrolling' with their dropdowns set to 'Enabled'.

task_completion.description: Verify the download directory and prompt settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Chrome Downloads settings showing the location set to '/home/ga/Documents/Surveillance_Reports' and the toggle for 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' turned on.

task_completion.description: Verify that password saving is disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Chrome Password Manager settings showing the 'Offer to save passwords' toggle turned off.

integrity.description: Agent used the Chrome browser GUI to configure settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the Chrome browser GUI to configure settings, rather than using terminal commands to edit configuration files.

integrity.description: Changes are made in the actual Chrome browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The settings are changed within the actual Google Chrome browser interface, not in a text editor or simulated environment.

integrity.description: Agent did not directly modify Chrome's internal databases.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent directly modifying Chrome's SQLite databases or JSON preference files via terminal scripts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified expected values: Folders: 'Surveillance Feeds', 'Disease Databases', 'GIS & Mapping', 'Reporting Tools', 'Personal'. Search engine shortcuts: 'pub', 'mmwr', 'epi'. Flags: 'parallel-downloading', 'smooth-scrolling'. Startup URLs: 'cdc.gov', 'who.int', 'promedmail.org'.
